title: citrus × tachibana subf. himekitsu
intro: Citrus × tachibana subf. himekitsu is a plant that is a hybrid of the satsuma mandarin (Citrus unshiu) and the rough lemon (Citrus jambhiri), and is also known as the "himekitsu" mandarin. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × tachibana subf. himekitsu include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving digestion, as well as boosting the immune system and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make medicine, cosmetics, and other products.
